auth_delete_confirm_warning: Are you sure you want to delete your account? This action is irreversible: all your data (such as your favorites) will be permanently erased, with no possibility of recovery.
auth_email_not_verified_description: Your account is not activated. Please activate it before trying to sign in. If you need help, contact us.
auth_error_banned_user: Your account has been suspended. Contact hello@petit-meme.io for more information.

auth_error_too_many_requests: Too many attempts, please try again in a few minutes

auth_error_user_already_exists_use_anoth: This email address is already in use. Please use a different one.
auth_invalid_link_description: The password reset link is no longer valid or is incorrect.
auth_invalid_link_title: Your link appears to be invalid!
auth_password_updated_description: Your password has been successfully updated. You can now sign in with your new credentials.
auth_reset_email_sent_description: All good! If we find an account associated with this email address, you will receive a link to reset your password within a few minutes.
auth_signup_success_description: Your account has been created successfully, but it must be activated before you can sign in. We just sent you an email to activate it. If you don't receive it within a few minutes, please check your spam folder or contact us.
auth_signup_success_title: Almost there, just verify your email!
auth_twitter_error: An error occurred while signing in with Twitter

Your purchase is confirmed and your account has been updated. You can now enjoy all your premium features.
cookie_description: We use analytics cookies to improve your experience and analyze traffic.
error_already_subscribed: You already have an active subscription!

error_sign_out: An error occurred while signing out
error_video_timeout: Video engine loading took too long. Check your connection or browser.
manifest_description: Explore, create and share legendary memes on Petit Meme!
legal_mentions_description: Legal notice for the Petit Meme website. Information about the publisher, hosting provider and intellectual property.
legal_privacy_description: Petit Meme privacy policy. Learn how we collect, use and protect your personal data.
legal_terms_description: By using our website (https://petit-meme.io) and our services, you accept these Terms of Use.
locale_banner_available: This site is also available in {language}.
home_faq_a1: Petit Mème is an online library that gathers the best video memes from the web. You can browse them, save your favorites and easily share them with your friends.
home_faq_a2: Yes. Access to video memes is completely free. Paid features only cover additional services, such as watermark-free downloads or advanced customization options.
home_faq_a3: The videos come from the internet and social media. Petit Mème does not own the rights to these videos: they are made available for viewing only.
home_faq_a4: Not at the moment. Only the site administrator can add new memes. But this feature may evolve in the future.
home_faq_a5: If you own a video and would like it removed, you can contact us directly by email.
home_faq_a6: Petit Mème does not resell videos and does not claim to own the rights. Access is free and intended for personal use, as found on social media. Premium features only cover additional services (unlimited favorites, watermark-free downloads, etc.) and do not grant any commercial rights to the videos.
home_faq_q3: Where do the videos come from?
home_faq_q4: Can I upload my own memes?
home_faq_q5: What if a video belongs to me or I want it removed?
home_hero_description: Explore the largest collection of video memes and share them in 1 click. Add text to make them unique.
home_responsive_card_text: Perfectly adapts to all screen sizes
home_responsive_description: Petit Mème adapts to you: a smooth and responsive experience on mobile, tablet, and desktop, with nothing to install.
meme_search_description: Type, click, laugh: discover all memes in one place.
meme_seo_category_description: Discover {title} memes. Free and accessible to everyone!
meme_seo_library_description: Discover the largest meme library: create, explore, and share legendary memes on Petit Meme. Free and accessible to everyone!
plan_free_description: Try for free with no time limit. Discover memes, create your first content and save your favorites without entering your credit card.
plan_premium_description: Go unlimited. Create as many videos as you want, save all your favorites and enjoy an experience with no restrictions.
pricing_description: Choose the plan that fits your needs, from free to unlimited.
pricing_faq_a1: Yes, you can cancel your subscription in one click from your settings. You keep Premium access until the end of the paid period, with no hidden fees.
pricing_faq_a2: Choose a meme, add your custom text and the video is generated automatically. Free users get 3 generations, Premium users get unlimited.
pricing_faq_a3: Absolutely. Payments are handled by Stripe, the world leader in online payments. We do not store any banking data. Your personal data is protected in accordance with GDPR.
pricing_faq_a4: Simply select "Annual" in the toggle above and click "Upgrade to Premium". If you're already subscribed monthly, you can manage your subscription from your settings.
pricing_faq_q1: Can I cancel at any time?
pricing_faq_q4: How do I switch to the annual plan?
sentry_message_placeholder: What went wrong? What did you expect?
seo_category_all_description: Discover page {page} of our complete collection of video memes.
seo_category_page_description: Discover page {page} of the best video memes in the {title} category.
seo_home_description: Discover Petit Meme, the platform where you can browse, create and share memes for free. Explore our library of funny videos and images, save your favorites and enjoy always up-to-date content.
seo_home_page_name: Petit Meme - The best video memes
seo_home_title: Your video meme library, ready to make the Internet laugh
seo_meme_fallback_description: Discover, download and share this "{title}" meme with everyone. Download the video meme for free.
seo_pricing_description: Discover Petit Meme plans: free or Premium with unlimited access to memes, favorites and video generations. Choose the plan that lets you create and share memes without limits!
seo_pricing_keywords: meme pricing, video meme subscription, petit meme price, free meme plan, premium memes, video meme generator

settings_cancel_subscription_first: You must cancel your subscription first
settings_data_description: Download a copy of your data in JSON format (GDPR)
settings_delete_account_description: Permanently delete your account and all your data
settings_favorites_description: Your favorite memes, always at hand: find them here.
studio_error: The video engine could not be loaded.
studio_privacy_notice: Everything happens directly on your device. Nothing is sent or stored on our servers — your files stay private.

submit_copyright_dmca_notice: Any content can be removed upon legitimate request from the rights holder (DMCA).
submit_copyright_ownership: Petit Meme does not own any rights to the videos. Memes and short clips already publicly shared are accepted.
submit_description: Suggest a meme to be added on Petit Meme.
submit_empty_state: You haven't submitted any memes yet.
submit_error_duplicate_url: This link has already been submitted
submit_error_invalid_url: Please enter a valid HTTPS link
submit_error_title_too_short: Title must be at least 3 characters
submit_error_limit_reached: You've reached the pending submissions limit
submit_error_rate_limit: Too many submissions, please try again later
submit_login_cta: Sign in to suggest a meme
submit_login_description: You must be signed in to submit a meme.
submit_rule_appropriate: Appropriate content — no NSFW, graphic violence, hate or harassment
submit_rule_duration: Max 30 seconds — long clips will be rejected
submit_rule_language: Correct audio language — select the language spoken in the video
submit_rule_no_duplicate: No duplicates — check that the meme isn't already on the site
submit_rule_quality: Decent quality — no blurry video, screen recordings or massive watermarks
submit_rule_source: Direct source link — tweet/X or YouTube video only
submit_rule_viral: Viral content only — the meme must be recognized and shared on social media
submit_rules_warning: Submissions that don't follow these rules will be rejected without explanation.
submit_url_error: The link must be a tweet (x.com/twitter.com) or a YouTube video

validation_accept_terms: You must accept the terms to continue
